title: Shroff Eye Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Shroff Eye Centre is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Shroff Eye Centre, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Allahabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Shroff Eye Centre:
Shroff Eye Centre is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Wound Care

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shroff Eye Centre!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
